name: Frankenstein
bio:
Scientifically transformed into a Cyborg. Eager for understanding and acceptance, he joined the Net of Secrets to protect humans with special abilities and find the meaning of existence.

Role: Group Protection
Specialty: A frontline Protection-type hero that can provide shields and damage reduction to allies.

skillSlots.name: Electrotherapy
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemy targets, dealing 90 P.DMG while converting 20% of DMG dealt into Shields for other Ally Heroes (lasts 2 turns).

skillSlots.name: Scientific Modification
skillSlots.description: All allies enter [Synergy] Status - 50% of DMG taken (excluding DMG Over Time and Reflection) is transferred to other allies for 2 turns (undispellable).
